prompts.name: Hand on Chest
prompts.text: Pose the subject with one hand resting naturally on the chest, suggesting sincerity, surprise, or emotional emphasis.

prompts.name: Sitting by Window
prompts.text: Pose the subject sitting near a window with relaxed body language, natural light, and thoughtful atmosphere.

prompts.name: Ready Crouch
prompts.text: Pose the subject in a low ready crouch with stable balance, alert eyes, and dynamic tension.

prompts.name: Turning Motion
prompts.text: Pose the subject mid-turn with flowing hair or clothing, natural torso rotation, and a captured-in-motion feeling.

prompts.name: Adjusting Clothes
prompts.text: Pose the subject adjusting clothing, sleeves, tie, scarf, or collar with believable hand placement.

prompts.name: Holding Hat
prompts.text: Pose the subject holding or adjusting a hat with natural fingers, stylish body language, and clear silhouette.

prompts.name: Knees Up Sitting
prompts.text: Pose the subject sitting with knees drawn up, relaxed arms, and an intimate or cozy feeling.

prompts.name: Side Sitting
prompts.text: Pose the subject sitting sideways with elegant leg placement, balanced torso, and graceful posture.

prompts.name: Backlit Standing
prompts.text: Pose the subject standing against backlight with a strong readable silhouette and calm presence.

prompts.name: Walking Away
prompts.text: Pose the subject walking away or into the distance with natural stride and storytelling mood.

prompts.name: Reaching Up
prompts.text: Pose the subject reaching upward with extended arm, open body line, and hopeful energy.

prompts.name: Covering One Eye
prompts.text: Pose the subject with one hand or object partially covering one eye, creating mystery or playful character.

prompts.name: Head Resting on Hand
prompts.text: Pose the subject resting their head on one hand with relaxed elbow support and thoughtful mood.

prompts.name: Open Arms
prompts.text: Pose the subject with arms open in a welcoming, excited, or freeing gesture.

prompts.name: Cloak Sweep
prompts.text: Pose the subject with a sweeping cloak, coat, or cape creating dramatic motion and shape.
